sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14870" key="a)rguro/rizos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργῠρό-ριζος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥίζα</etym>) <sense id="n14870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with silver root,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παγαὶ Ταρτησσοῦ ἀ.,</foreign> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having silver in the soil,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
